message:
test(core): add 11 tests for lock_order module

- LockLevel Display format (includes rank), unique ranks across all levels
- from_ordinal boundary cases (COUNT, 999, usize::MAX)
- OrderedMutex/OrderedRwLock level() getters
- Deref/DerefMut for both Mutex and RwLock guards
- try_lock failure when mutex is already held (release mode)
- LockContentionEntry Debug and Clone
- LockLevel Copy/Clone/Eq traits
- DurationNanosU64 edge cases (zero, 1s, MAX saturates)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
